title: Simply Survival
description: A simple modpack tailor made for survival worlds
body:
# Simply Survival Modpack

## Description

The Simply Survival Modpack is designed to enhance your Minecraft survival experience while keeping it straightforward and enjoyable. This carefully curated collection of mods focuses on improving various aspects of the game without changing the game or increasing complexity. Here’s what you can expect:

<details>
<summary>Features</summary>

- **Enhanced Visuals**: Enjoy improved graphics with shaders like BSL Shaders, Complementary Shaders, and Solas Shader, which bring vibrant and realistic lighting to your world.
- **Improved User Interface**: Mods such as Better Advancements, Better Mount HUD, Better Statistics Screen, and BetterF3 offer a more intuitive and informative interface, making it easier to manage your gameplay.
- **Performance Boosts**: Experience smoother gameplay with performance-enhancing mods like Lithium, Sodium, and ImmediatelyFast.
- **Quality of Life Enhancements**: Mods like AppleSkin, ItemPhysic Lite, Shulker Box Tooltip, and Zoomify add small yet impactful improvements to your survival experience.
- **Customization Options**: Personalize your game with mods like Cosmetica, CTM Selector and more.
- **Improved user experience**: We use mods that improve the experience inside Minecraft, such as Craftify, a mod that allows you to control your music from a variety of sources all without leaving the game.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Why Download Simply Survival?</summary>

- **Balanced Gameplay**: This modpack aims to improve your Minecraft experience without altering the gameplay. It’s perfect for players who want a more polished and refined survival mode.
- **User-Friendly**: With clear, honest descriptions and easy-to-use interfaces, these mods are accessible to players of all skill levels.
- **Enhanced Aesthetics**: From shaders to connected textures, the visual upgrades will make your world look stunning.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Mods Included</summary>

- **3D Skin Layers** by tr7zw (v1.6.6)
- **AppleSkin** by squeek502 (v3.0.2+mc1.20.5)

- **Better Mount HUD** by Lortseam (v1.2.3)
- **Better Statistics Screen** by TheCSDev (v3.12.2+fabric-1.20.6)
- **BetterF3** by TreyRuffy (v10.0.2)
- **Bobby** by Johni0702 (v5.2.1+mc1.20.6)

Enjoy a refined and simple Minecraft survival experience with the Simply Survival Modpack!
